reviews.title: Worst hotel
reviews.positives: Nothing
reviews.negatives:
I had a very disappointing stay at this hotel. The cleanliness was unacceptable — everything felt filthy and neglected. There were visible stains everywhere: on the walls, the elevator, the bed, sheets, bathroom, and even the toilet seat. The room looked nothing like the pictures online. Air conditioning leaking water, door locks jams, not closing, everytime closes door i had to multiple try.

This is absolutely not a 4-star hotel. The supposed “beach view” was actually a view of trash and litter — far from what was advertised. Coming from Grand World, this experience completely ruined the vibe of my trip.

For $110 USD for 4 nights in Vietnam, you can find much better hotels with proper hygiene and service. To make matters worse, I had bugs in my room. I woke up with bites all over my back and arms for three consecutive nights. Housekeeping didn’t even change the sheets — they just rearranged them. It wasn’t until the final night, after I complained, that they finally replaced the bedding.

I do not recommend this hotel to anyone. Save your money and stay somewhere that respects basic cleanliness and guest comfort.

reviews.title: Scam Hotel
reviews.text: I booked an Executive room for three people on Agoda — that’s what I paid for! But when I arrived at the hotel, they had the nerve to charge me extra for a so-called “additional guest” just because I wrote two people in the notes. Are you kidding me? I clearly paid for a room meant for three. I didn’t bring more than three guests, I didn’t exceed the limit — so why am I being charged more? This is absolutely ridiculous. And don’t get me started on the staff — rude, unhelpful, and completely unprofessional. The room? Old, musty, and far from what you’d expect from a so-called 4-star hotel. Honestly, this place is a joke. I would never recommend anyone to stay here.

reviews.title: fraudulent business
reviews.text: They ran an affordable promotion which we bought into. When we finally arrived that night the receptionist informed us the price of our room was increased by 200k each night. We declined and the receptionist feigned innocence saying he does not have the authority to cancel the reservation. So we had to drag our luggage to go find another place in the middle of the night. The. the next morning we received a message from the hotel that said they understood our concern about the price increase but they’re gonna charge us the reservation anyway. And that’s not an attempt at comedy. They actually typed that and meant it.  I was wondering why they let us pay at the hotel. Because if something is too good to be true, it is a fraud in vietnam.

reviews.title: Maris Beach Hotel Review – A Disappointing Stay
reviews.text:
I recently stayed at Maris Beach Hotel for three nights, but unfortunately, my experience was far from great. While the hotel might suit travelers looking for peace and quiet, it has several drawbacks that made my stay less enjoyable.

Location (2/5)
The hotel is quite far from the main road, making it inconvenient to explore the area. You’ll need a taxi or motorbike to reach restaurants, shops, or attractions, which adds extra cost and hassle.

WiFi (1/5)
The WiFi was practically unusable—especially in the room. If you rely on a stable internet connection, this hotel is not a good choice.

Room (3/5)
The room was spacious but outdated. The furnishings and decor felt old and in need of renovation. Cleanliness was acceptable, but the lack of modern amenities was noticeable.

Breakfast (3/5)
The breakfast selection was okay, but most of the food was served cold, which was disappointing. A few warm options or better food maintenance would improve the experience.

Final Thoughts
If you’re looking for a quiet, secluded stay and don’t mind poor WiFi, limited food quality, and an inconvenient location, Maris Beach might work for you. However, for a more comfortable and convenient stay, I’d recommend looking elsewhere.

reviews.title: Stay with family
reviews.text:
🏨 Hotel Review (Agoda Booking)

✅ Positives
- Location: Excellent, just 2 minutes from the beach.  
- Room: Spacious family room with sea view; easily accommodates 4 people.  
- Value: Reasonably priced for the size and location.  

⚠️ Concerns
- Address Confusion: Agoda confirmation showed a different address; hotel operates under two names, one of which is closed. Guests must double-check before arrival.  
- Staffing: Very limited staff (3–4 people total). Guests carry their own luggage. At night, only a watchman and receptionist are present, which can feel unsettling.  
- Management: Property is large but poorly managed; feels neglected.  
- Food: No Indian food available. Breakfast limited to bread and omelette.  
- Atmosphere: At times, the hotel feels deserted, almost like staying in a haunted place.  

📝 Overall
A brand-new hotel with potential, but management needs to take responsibility and improve staffing, service, and food options. Good for budget travelers who want a large sea-facing room near the beach, but not ideal if you expect full-service  hospitality

reviews.title: Average hotel - just expect the basic
reviews.text:
The only real positive about this hotel is the location — it’s just 100 meters from the beach, very close to the main market street, and conveniently located near the airport as well.

The hotel itself is quite small in size, which might work for travelers who only need a basic place to sleep, but it does limit comfort and space overall.

Unfortunately, the overall experience wasn’t great. The staff were not very accommodating; they couldn’t assist with simple breakfast requests like warm milk or boiled eggs. We stayed for five days, and the breakfast was exactly the same every single day with no variation. While I understand that language can sometimes be a barrier, it was disappointing that even after showing a visibly dirty cup, the staff didn’t understand the need to replace it.

Overall, this hotel is fine only if you’re looking for a place to sleep at night and plan to be out exploring the entire day. For comfort, service, or a pleasant breakfast experience, it falls short.

reviews.title: Poor front desk experience!
reviews.text:
I have been staying in this hotel for 2 nights and the holiday mood has totally ruined by the poor front desk service. We were served by a fair, small built lady but who has never show her smile throughout the stay. On the first day of arrival, during the check-in I greeted her with a smile but was ignored. She only read out the rules and regulations of the hotel with a monotonous voice and it was clearly shown she was doing it just because it was part of her job. Clearly, she was not only doing that to me but the same to other travellers who are checking in there too. Most of the times when we were passing by the check in counter, she would be on her phone call chatting with someone else, and yea, clearly she could actually smile and laugh, but not towards the customers.
My main concerns throughout the stay:
1. Terribly poor front desk service
2. We didn't ask for a room clean up service on the second day of our stay, but after we got back to the hotel, the room was cleaned up, it means that they entered our room even we didn't hang the  "make up my room" sign on the door, this makes me feel so insecure staying in this hotel as they might intrude into the room without permission, it could be even when Im still in the room.
3. There was a blackout in the hotel lasted for about 1-2 hours, in the afternoon of our second day of stay. Initially we were thinking of getting back to the hotel to have a nap before heading out again for our dinner, but it turned out to be the hotel

reviews.title: Horribly.
reviews.text:
Pros:

The room is reasonably clean, but far from perfect.

The location is decent.

Cons:

The breakfasts are absolutely unacceptable. Everything is cold and unappetizing. There is only one meat option (one day it was duck, another day pork). If you arrive slightly late for breakfast, you may not get any meat at all — first come, first served. Tea is available only in small teapots, which are often empty (no hot water or tea bags). There are very few side dish options. There are also endless queues for omelets and pancakes.

There is a huge “sewage lake” between the hotel and the beach. It smells very bad and is full of rubbish.

The hotel is in need of renovation.

Nous avons trouvé que c’était l’emplacement idéal pour quiconque veut séjourner à Phu Quoc pendant quelques jours.  Le petit déjeuner est varié mais répétitif.

The breakfast was just a monotonous way to fill up in the morning. The distance to the beach is about 50 meters, and the seawater was murky and had a fishy smell, so we only used it in the early morning.

The room is spacious and clean. The shower temperature is warm and the drainage is good. Breakfast has a limited variety and the taste is average. Beach towels can be borrowed from the front desk by writing down the number and your name. It's close to the airport and I think it's good value for money, but I thought it would be better to pay a little more and stay at a 5-star hotel.

Also the room is spacious a but it smells like molds and no airing can get rid of the smell/scents. The shower curtain is molded too. I know it comes with price and I’m traveling alone so I picked this hotel to keep my budget in check.  but even I booked for two days I had to book another more expensive hotel for the second day and checked out early. So $$ wasted.

部屋の照明のコントロールスイッチがベッドサイドに無かったので、ちょっと不便だった。
ホテル名は新しく変わっていたが、wi-fi を接続しようと思ったところまだ 古いホテルの名前だった。

reviews.title: Very comfortable
reviews.text: At first, when I just arrived at the hotel, I was quite surprised because it wasn't as beautiful as I thought. However, the longer I stayed, the more I liked the place. It may not be luxurious or grand like a five-star hotel, but I appreciate the calm atmosphere of the hotel. All my needs were met, the room was spacious and airy, with a nice sea view. If I needed any assistance, there were friendly staff to help. There was a beach right next to the hotel where I could swim anytime and a small beer counter there for relaxation. It was very convenient to travel to tourist spots. The food was quite simple, but I think it was suitable. I'm grateful for the beautiful Phu Quoc beach and the wonderful experiences. I will definitely come back again.

reviews.title: Анхаарах
reviews.text:
Тухайн зочид буудал байршил сайн үнэ үнэтэй байсан. 
Тулгарсан асуудал:
1.Эхний өдөр өрөөнөөс маш их ариутгалын бодис холормин үнэртэж байсан. Харшил хөдлөөд эмэгтэй ресепшинд хэлсэн боловч манайх бодис ашигладаггүй гэж хэлээд тоогоогүй цуцлах гэхээр буцаалт байхгүй гэсэн. Орой бүр унтаж чадахгүй эрэгтэй ресепшинээс лаа үнэртүүлэгч хүртэл асуухад ашгүй сайхан сэтгэлтэй залуу байж хайж өгсөн. Өглөө нь тэр эрэгтэй өөрөө цэвэрлэгээний ажилтнуудтай орж ирж цэвэрлэж өгсөн. Ганц л эмэгтэй муу ажилтан байсан. Үүдний ресепшинд
Хоолны газрын ажилтнууд найрсаг гоё  байсан. 
 Тулгарсан асуудал 2
Усан сангийн цэвэрлэгээний нүхний таг онгорхой байснаас болж 4 настай хүүхдийн гар сорогдож тохой хүртлээ сорогдсон. Тохой нь мултарч гар нь битүү шимэгдсэн ердөө 1мин хүрэхгүй хугацаанд тэгээд хүүхдээ өрөөндөө оруулаад нөгөө эмэгтэй ресепшин бас таарсан болсон асуудлыг хэлэхэд манай цэвэрлэх унтраастай байна гэсэн уур хүрээд дөнгөж 5 минут өмнө ажиллаж байгаад ийм зүйл боллоо гэхэд үл тоосон шинжтэй байхад үнэхээр хэлэх үг олдоогүй. Өрөөндөө орж хүүхдийн эмчтэй ярьж эмнэлэг явж рентген зураг авхуулая тохой оруулж чаддаг хүн байна уу гэж буцаад ресепшин дээр очсон тэгсэн өрөөнд орж ирж хүүхэд харчаад би такси дуудаад өгхүү гэхэд нь хамгийн ойрхон рентген зураг авдаг эмнэлэг олоод өгөөч гэж гуйсан. Тэгтэл зүгээр grab такси дуудсан байсан нөгөө эмнэлэгт нь очсон олон улсын эмнэлэг яваарай бид үзэх боломжгүй гэсэн хэхэ буцаж ирээд зүгээр grab дуудах байсан бол би өөрөө ч чадна үнэхээр харицлагагүй юмаа гэж л хэлсэн. Тэгээд хүүхдээ монголруу мэс заслын эмчтэй видео калл хийж байж аав нь өөрөө тохойг нь оруулсан ашгүй маргааш нь гарах өдөр болж Vinpearl явсан .  Хотын голд юм үзэх гэж буусан боловч бараг хурдан 5 хоног дуусаасай гэж бодсон

reviews.title: Wonderful holiday
reviews.text:
Reading a series of negative reviews made me feel confused and worried, but when I was here, I found it quite wonderful.

The hotel is affordable and fully equipped (swimming pool, close to the beach, etc.) along with a breakfast buffet that suits my taste.

It is located right on the busy main road with plenty of shops and supermarkets. It's a 10-minute drive to the Phu Quoc night market.

The rooms are clean and fresh, cleaned every day.

The staff is okay, providing thorough guidance, unlike some negative reviews mentioned.

Overall, everything is great. I am very satisfied with my 2-night stay here.

If you're unsure where to stay, choose this place, don't read the other negative reviews but experience it like I did. 👍

reviews.title: Tuyệt vời

Chân thành cảm on chủ khách sạn đã cho gia đình tôi noi nghĩ thật tuyệt vời! reviews.title: High cost-performance ratio.
reviews.text: The room is large, with a balcony and an open sea view. The breakfast is abundant (there is porridge, soup, rice noodles, sausage, fried rice, fried noodles, spring rolls, steamed sweet potatoes, fried eggs, two kinds of drinks, three kinds of fruit, bread, jam, fried chicken or braised beef, etc. every day). The swimming pool is very large, over 70 square meters, and is cleaned by employees every day. The water quality is maintained very well. The hotel is somewhat secluded; it is over 300 meters to the bus stop, and there is only one restaurant nearby selling tacos, which is expensive and not tasty, and also adds a 3% service fee, so I do not recommend going there. There are many restaurants once you reach the bus stop.

reviews.title: Relaxing Long Stay at a Beautiful Beachfront Hotel
reviews.text:
I stayed at Maris Beach Hotel for 16 nights and had a truly relaxing and enjoyable experience. My room was on the 7th floor, overlooking the pool with a stunning sea view — an ideal setting for a beachfront getaway.

The location is excellent: quietly tucked away from the main road, yet only about 500 steps to the main strip, offering a peaceful environment without sacrificing convenience. The beach is right in front of the hotel, and the swimming there was fantastic.

The room itself was spacious, with a generously sized bathroom and a huge bath — perfect for unwinding. The air-conditioning worked exceptionally well, and thoughtful in-room touches like bottled water provided daily, a small fridge, tea and coffee facilities, bathrobes, and even flip-flops made the stay very comfortable.

The hotel’s pool area is beautiful and relaxing, with plenty of sun lounges and lovely lighting in the evenings. It felt like a little oasis.

Breakfast was a highlight — the buffet offered an excellent selection and was always fresh and satisfying. The rooms were kept exceptionally clean throughout my stay, with the room attendants providing top-class service.

One area that could be improved is the check-in experience. The front desk staff could benefit from additional training to make the arrival process smoother and more welcoming, which would help elevate the overall guest experience.

That said, I’m very grateful to the hotel for accommodating my request for a high-floor, quiet room — it made a big difference to my stay.

Overall, I’d happily return and recommend Maris Beach Hotel to anyone looking for a quiet, beachfront stay with excellent amenities and beautiful surroundings.
